lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੋਇ ਬਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਮਨੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਜੀਠੈ ਰੰਗਨਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: niramal soe banee har baanee man naam majeetthai ranganaa |15|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Lord's Bani, one's reputation becomes immaculate, and the mind is colored by the dye of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||15||
God is the Creator of the body-vessel.
In the Society of the Saints, the dye is produced.
The sixteen powers, absolute perfection and fruitful rewards are obtained,
when the Lord and Master of infinite power is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਖ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਭੁੰਚਨਾ ॥੧੬॥੨॥੯॥
lines.translit: anad binod har naam sukh naanak amrit ras har bhunchanaa |16|2|9|
lines.english: The Lord's Name is Nanak's bliss, play and peace; he drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord. ||16||2||9||
Maaroo, Solhas, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
My soul and body are all gifts from You.
You are my Lord and Master; You have made me Your servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨ ਸਭੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਤੂਹੈ ਹੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਅਸਾੜਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: karan karaavan sabh toohai toohai hai naahee kichh asaarraa |1|
lines.english: You are the Creator, the Cause of causes; nothing belongs to me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਹਿ ਪਠਾਏ ਤਾ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: tumeh patthaae taa jag meh aae |
lines.english: When You sent me, I came into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਆ ਤਾ ਭੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਾੜਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tujh te baahar kichhoo na hoaa taa bhee naahee kichh kaarraa |2|
lines.english: Without You, nothing is done, so I am not anxious at all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣਾ ਸੇ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaanaa se karam kamaae |
lines.english: Whatever is pleasing to Your Will, I do.
In this world, I chant Your Praises, Lord.
In the world hereafter, the Hukam of Your Command is heard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਲੇਖ ਅਲੇਖੈ ਆਪੇ ਤੁਮ ਸਿਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਝਾੜਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape lekh alekhai aape tum siau naahee kichh jhaarraa |3|
lines.english: You Yourself write the account, and You Yourself erase it; no one can argue with You. ||3||
You are our father; we are all Your children.
We play as You cause us to play.
Some remain seated within their homes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਝੜ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਸਭੁ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਕੀਨਾ ਚਲੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋ ਵੇਪਾੜਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aujharr maarag sabh tum hee keenaa chalai naahee ko vepaarraa |4|
lines.english: The wilderness and the path are all made by You. No one can take the wrong path. ||4||
Some wander across the country and through foreign lands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਹੀ ਕਉ ਘਾਸੁ ਇਕ ਹੀ ਕਉ ਰਾਜਾ ਇਨ ਮਹਿ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਿਆ ਕੂੜਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: eik hee kau ghaas ik hee kau raajaa in meh kaheeai kiaa koorraa |5|
lines.english: Some are grass-cutters, and some are kings. Who among these can be called false? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਮੁਕਤੀ ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਨਰਕਾ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su mukatee kavan su narakaa |
lines.english: Who is liberated, and who will land in hell?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਦਾਨਾ ਕਵਨੁ ਸੁ ਹੋਛਾ ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਸੁਰਤਾ ਕਵਨੁ ਜੜਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kavan su daanaa kavan su hochhaa kavan su surataa kavan jarraa |6|
lines.english: Who is wise, and who is shallow? Who is aware, and who is ignorant? ||6||
Who is worldly, and who is a devotee?
By His Hukam, one is worldly, and by His Hukam, one is a devotee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਹੋਛਾ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਦਾਨਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਅਵਰੁ ਧੜਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: hukame hochhaa hukame daanaa doojaa naahee avar dharraa |7|
lines.english: By His Hukam, one is shallow, and by His Hukam, one is wise. There is no other side except His. ||7||
By the Hukam of the Lord's Command, one is liberated, and by His Hukam, one falls into hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਖੜੇ ਰਸਾਤਲਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਗਾਵਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eik kharre rasaatal kar manamukh gaavaaraa |
lines.english: You made some into foolish self-willed manmukhs, and dragged them into hell.
You made the ocean vast and huge.
You issue Your Command for this amazing thing, death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਵਹਿ ਆਪੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜਿਨ ਕਾ ਸਚੁ ਬੇੜਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: eikanaa paar langhaaveh aape satigur jin kaa sach berraa |8|
lines.english: Some are carried across, in the ship of Truth of the True Guru. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਖੈ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਸਭਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣੇ ਰਚਨੁ ਕੀਨਾ ਇਕੁ ਆਖਾੜਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: vekhai vigasai sabh rang maane rachan keenaa ik aakhaarraa |9|
lines.english: You gaze in delight upon the one arena of the world, and enjoy all the pleasures. ||9||
You create all beings and creatures, and absorb them back into Yourself.
He is the Great Giver; Great is His place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਅਤੋਲਾ ਹੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਹਾੜਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: agam agochar beant atolaa hai naahee kichh aahaarraa |10|
lines.english: He is inaccessible and unfathomable, infinite and unweighable. He cannot be measureed. ||10||
Great is the Lord and Master, and Great is His Name.
Only You Yourself, O Immaculate Lord, are equal to Yourself.
No one else knows His value.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਸੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਆਪਿ ਧਿਆਨੀ ਆਪਿ ਸਤਵੰਤਾ ਅਤਿ ਗਾੜਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: aap su giaanee aap dhiaanee aap satavantaa at gaarraa |11|
lines.english: You Yourself are the spiritual teacher, You Yourself are the One who meditates. You Yourself are the great and immense Being of Truth. ||11||
For so many days, You were absorbed in silent absorption.
For so many days, You remained invisible.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੜਿਆ ਦਿਨ ਧੁੰਧੂਕਾਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਪਰਗਟੜਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: ketarriaa din dhundhookaaraa aape karataa paragattarraa |12|
lines.english: For so many days, there was only pitch darkness, and then the Creator revealed Himself. ||12||
You Yourself are called the God of Supreme Power.
